description: DatoCMS is a headless content management system for modeling, managing, and delivering structured content to websites and applications. It provides APIs and tooling for content delivery, content management, schema migrations, and AI-assisted workflows.
summary: DatoCMS exposes a GraphQL Content Delivery API, an HTTP Content Management API, a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.datocms.com`, and the `datocms` npm CLI; all require authentication via DatoCMS-issued API tokens or OAuth depending on the surface.
